source.title: Demo reviewed fever agitation tachycardia case
source.citation: Local reviewed educational case file for Diagnostician demo content.
source.raw_text: De-identified educational case source assembled and reviewed for demo validation.

case.title: Fever, agitation, and marked tachycardia
teaching_points: Fever, agitation, severe tachycardia, gastrointestinal symptoms, and suppressed TSH with high free T4 form a high-risk endocrine pattern.
A recent medication lapse can precipitate decompensation in uncontrolled hyperthyroidism.
Scoring severity matters because treatment should not wait for every confirmatory detail.

facts.label: Opening concern
facts.value: The patient is brought in for palpitations, fever, and increasing confusion.

facts.label: Illness course
facts.value: Symptoms worsened over three days after a respiratory illness.

provenance.quote: Three days worsening after respiratory illness.

facts.label: Endocrine history
facts.value: She has Graves disease and ran out of methimazole about two weeks ago.

provenance.quote: Graves disease; out of methimazole for about two weeks.

facts.label: Associated symptoms
facts.value: She has tremor, diarrhea, heat intolerance, and has slept poorly for several nights.

provenance.quote: Tremor, diarrhea, heat intolerance, and poor sleep.

facts.label: Triage vitals
facts.value: Temperature is 40.1 C, heart rate 154/min, blood pressure 154/62 mmHg, respiratory rate 26/min, oxygen saturation 97% on room air.

facts.label: General and neck exam
facts.value: She is agitated, diaphoretic, tremulous, and has a diffusely enlarged nontender thyroid gland.

provenance.quote: Agitated, diaphoretic, tremulous, diffuse nontender goiter.

facts.label: Cardiac exam
facts.value: Cardiac rhythm is regular and very rapid without signs of pulmonary edema.

provenance.quote: Regular very rapid rhythm; no pulmonary edema.

facts.label: Thyroid function tests
facts.value: TSH is suppressed below the assay limit and free T4 is 5.8 ng/dL.

provenance.quote: TSH suppressed below assay limit; free T4 5.8 ng/dL.

facts.label: Metabolic panel
facts.value: Mild transaminitis and mild hyperglycemia are present; potassium is normal.

provenance.quote: Mild transaminitis and hyperglycemia; potassium normal.

facts.label: Chest radiograph
facts.value: Chest radiograph shows no pneumonia or pulmonary edema.

provenance.quote: No pneumonia or pulmonary edema on chest radiograph.

facts.label: Dangerous differential
facts.value: A life-threatening endocrine decompensation should be considered when hyperadrenergic signs occur with fever and altered mental status.

provenance.quote: Fever, severe tachycardia, agitation, medication lapse, and high free T4 support endocrine emergency.

facts.label: Hint 1
facts.value: Use the fever, severe tachycardia, agitation, diarrhea, tremor, and thyroid labs as one syndrome.

provenance.quote: Hyperadrenergic signs plus abnormal thyroid function tests are the key pattern.

facts.label: Final diagnosis
facts.value: Thyroid storm supported by Graves disease, antithyroid medication lapse, fever, severe tachycardia, agitation, gastrointestinal symptoms, and thyroid function tests.
